title: No Spear Minimum Reach
description: This mod/datapack adds a way to remove the minecraft spears minimum reach, along with some other benefits as well, such as a counter for baby zombies, silverfish, and endermites. (Cover is not part of the pack)
body:
# No Spear Minimum Reach
Minecrafts new spear is awesome, most of us know that. (I think)
But couldn't it be better?

This datapack (maybe mod in future) adds one recipe to rule them all. A way to remove the spears minimum reach, and backport its removed ability to hit mobs without hitbox contact.

The recipe?:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

In a smithing table, insert any spear, an echo shard, and some leather.
this is a bit of an odd recipe, and may change in future.

</details>

### One last thing
If you like my packs: please consider supporting and/or donating to me on [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/limeimortal), 
My Ko-Fi supporters also get a say in what packs I make next.
It helps so much, and means a lot.

Also: for anyone wanting a custom pack made for them; also send a dm to Lime_void on the Imortals Packs discord with your specific suggestion, your reason (if you have one) and a colour pallet if you want, a size, a name (optional) and what mod (or base minecraft) it should be for within.
